explorer_events.name: Void Wind
explorer_events.description: A sudden ripple of void-energy buffets you, threatening to knock you off course.
explorer_events.success: You brace yourself and weather the surge. It passes quickly.
explorer_events.failure: The energy catches you off guard. You lose your footing and take a hard tumble.

explorer_events.name: Hidden Cache
explorer_events.description: You spot something glinting in a crevice — a hidden cache of supplies.
explorer_events.success: You find a small cache of useful materials!
explorer_events.failure: You reach for it, but it's just a reflection. Nothing here.

explorer_events.name: Strange Sound
explorer_events.description: An eerie humming fills the air, making your teeth vibrate.
explorer_events.success: You focus your mind and the sound fades. Just the void playing tricks.
explorer_events.failure: The sound gets inside your head. Your concentration wavers.

explorer_events.name: {seed_name}'s Warning
explorer_events.description: {seed_name} pulses urgently — it senses something nearby.
explorer_events.success: {seed_name}'s awareness reveals a hidden danger in the next room. You'll be prepared.

steward_events.name: NPC Argument
steward_events.description: Two of your settlers are having a heated disagreement about how to organize supplies.
steward_events.success: You mediate the argument successfully. Both parties feel heard.
steward_events.failure: The argument escalates. Both NPCs are in worse moods.

steward_events.name: Resource Shortage
steward_events.description: Supplies are running low. The settlers are worried about food and water.
steward_events.success: You redistribute supplies efficiently. Crisis averted.
steward_events.failure: The shortage strains morale. Everyone tightens their belts.

steward_events.name: {seed_name} Growth Spurt
steward_events.description: {seed_name} pulses with sudden energy, its roots spreading visibly.
steward_events.success: {seed_name} grows a little stronger! The skerry feels more alive.

steward_events.name: Void Debris
steward_events.description: A chunk of debris drifts close to the skerry.
steward_events.success: You spot useful materials in the debris and salvage them!
steward_events.failure: The debris drifts past before you can reach it.

steward_events.name: Peaceful Day
steward_events.description: The void is calm today. A rare moment of tranquility on the skerry.
steward_events.success: Everyone rests well. The quiet is a gift.

steward_events.name: NPC Request
steward_events.description: One of the settlers approaches you with a personal request.
steward_events.success: You take time to listen and help. Their loyalty increases.
steward_events.failure: You're too busy to give them proper attention. They understand, but they're disappointed.
